parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

parameters.name: exclude_unsaved
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that aren't saved to the account's profile page

parameters.name: exclude_saved
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that are saved to the account's profile page

parameters.name: exclude_unlimited
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that can be purchased an unlimited number of times

parameters.name: exclude_limited_upgradable
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that can be purchased a limited number of times and can be upgraded to unique

parameters.name: exclude_limited_non_upgradable
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that can be purchased a limited number of times and can't be upgraded to unique

parameters.name: exclude_unique
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude unique gifts

parameters.name: exclude_from_blockchain
parameters.description: Pass True to exclude gifts that were assigned from the TON blockchain and can't be resold or transferred in Telegram

parameters.name: sort_by_price
parameters.description: Pass True to sort results by gift price instead of send date. Sorting is applied before pagination.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the first entry to return as received from the previous request; use empty string to get the first chunk of results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of gifts to be returned; 1-100. Defaults to 100.
